metadata.name: Roll Back a Failed Game Patch

description: A new game patch has introduced a critical bug causing widespread crashes. The patch must be rolled back immediately.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the high volume of crash reports following the new patch deployment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the correlation between the new patch and the crash reports.

nodes.task_description: Identify the previous stable version of the game server software.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the version number of the last stable build.

nodes.task_description: Execute a script to revert all game servers to the previous stable version.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully runs the rollback script, and servers begin to stabilize.
